mnemonics.title: Formatting Levels
mnemonics.content: "Low = Layout, Logical = Library" — Low-level formatting creates the physical layout (sectors). Logical formatting creates the library (file system structures) on top of it.

mnemonics.title: MBR Structure
mnemonics.content: "446 + 64 + 2 = 512" — Bootstrap code (446 bytes) + Partition table (64 bytes) + Magic number (2 bytes) = 512 bytes (one sector).

mnemonics.title: Sparing vs Slipping
mnemonics.content: "Spare = Jump far, Slip = Slide near" — Sector sparing jumps to a spare from a distant pool. Sector slipping slides adjacent sectors over by one position to fill the gap.
